title: AI Deactivate

posts.author: jrmfzf (Jarrod)
posts.cookedHtml: I recently had a need to temporarily deactivate an AI column. I was wanting to import a bunch of historical records and didn’t want AI to auto-categorize as the import spreadsheet already had them categorized. I selected the column and chose to “Deactivate AI”. However, when I went to reactivate the column I found that the settings within the AI column had actually been cleared out completely, meaning I had to set everything back up. To me, this feels more like a “Delete” function if you’re clearing out settings vs a deactivate where you’re just preventing the AI from running. It would be nice to get this corrected.
